name: Skill with scripts and dependencies
query: Build an Antigravity skill that validates JSON schema files against a dataset, with a Python validation script in scripts/. Category: data.
expected_behavior: Name uses gerund form, kebab-case, ≤64 chars, lowercase+hyphens only, no reserved words
Description starts with 3rd-person verb and includes 'Use when' with 3+ trigger phrases
Front matter uses ONLY standard fields — no custom fields
Body is under 500 lines with all steps starting with imperative verbs
Output includes correct mkdir path for Antigravity ecosystem (~/.gemini/antigravity/skills/)
Scripts are placed in scripts/ directory with deterministic logic offloaded
Scripts handle errors explicitly — no punting to Claude (try/except with helpful messages)
Configuration constants are documented with justification (no voodoo constants)
Required packages listed with install commands (e.g., pip install jsonschema)
All file paths use forward slashes only (no backslashes)
Includes a feedback loop: validate → fix errors → re-validate
Validation/verification steps present for the critical schema-checking operation
